title: Экзамены — A1 to C2 Exams
description: CEFR-style level tests (A1 beginner → C2 mastery) built from the app's vocabulary, verbs and grammar, with multiple-choice questions and a scored result.

mcq.q: What gender is the noun окно?
Choose the correct possessive: Это ___ книга (my book).
What is the plural of стол (table)?
mcq.explain: Hard masculine nouns take -ы in the plural.

mcq.q: Который час? — Сейчас ___ (1:00).
Past tense (she): Она ___ книгу (to read).
Я иду ___ магазин (to the shop).
mcq.explain: Direction into an enclosed place uses в + accusative.

mcq.q: Comparative of большой (big):
У меня нет ___ (no time, время).
Я ___ книгу вчера (I read it through — completed).
mcq.explain: A completed action uses the perfective прочитал.

mcq.q: Dative: Я дал книгу ___ (to my brother, брат).
mcq.explain: The indirect object takes the dative: брату.

mcq.q: Instrumental: Я пишу ___ (with a pen, ручка).
mcq.explain: ‘by means of’ uses the instrumental: ручкой.

mcq.q: Choose: Она говорит по-___ (in Russian).
Prepositional: Мы говорили ___ (about the project, проект).
Genitive plural: У нас много ___ (students, студент).
Conditional: Если бы я ___ время, я бы помог.
mcq.explain: Past-tense form with бы: ‘если бы было время’.

mcq.q: Active participle: ‘the student who is reading’ = ___ студент.
Academic connector for ‘therefore / consequently’:
Past passive participle: ‘the written article’ = ___ статья.
Verbal adverb (деепричастие) of ‘having read’:
Choose the academic register for ‘it is necessary to note’:
mcq.explain: ‘следует отметить’ is the impersonal scholarly form.

mcq.q: Choose the most academic phrasing for ‘this is caused by…’:
Genitive chain: ‘the analysis of the results of the study’ =
‘Несмотря на’ governs which case?
Choose the hedging marker meaning ‘apparently / evidently’:
